place_label: Seasonal drainage sector near study-area ridge
local_notes: Water flows strongly here for a few days after heavy rain, then dries.
Elders call this stretch the dark-sand bend.
sediment_observations: Dark heavy sand collects in the inner bend of the channel after flow.
Lighter sand washes downstream; darker grains remain in traps.
rock_observations: White quartz-like fragments scattered along the upstream slope.
Cracked bedrock exposed where water cuts the bank.
water_drainage_observations: Single seasonal channel draining the ridge toward the lowland.
Flow concentrates against the rock shelf on the eastern side.
